name: ck3-index
description: Semantic CK3 and Godherja index with diagnostics, precision map context, GIS terrain, hydrology, and relative bathymetry.

interface.shortDescription: Inspect and review CK3 mod code semantically.
interface.longDescription: Adds a read-only semantic CK3 and Godherja index for discovery, inspection, review, dependency analysis, diagnostics, localization and resources, plus precision map context, physical GIS analysis, relative bathymetry, and adaptive atlas rendering.
defaultPrompt: Inspect this CK3 change with ck3-index before editing, then verify it with ck3_review.
